blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability to add/remove options after launch.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of adding/removing options after launch, as stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence does not include any checks or validations that confirm this functionality was tested or that the system allows for such modifications post-launch. The linked use case mentions the need for this capability, but without concrete evidence demonstrating that this requirement was validated, it results in a gap.
gaps: No evidence of the ability to add/remove options after launch.

deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability to add/remove options after launch.
